title: Google Calendar Service Account Setup Guide
description: A step-by-step guide showing n8n users how to authenticate Google Calendar using service accounts instead of OAuth2, solving the limitation of missing service account options in the native connector.
gumroad_description:
You've built the workflow. Google Calendar authentication is the only thing standing between you and done — and n8n's native connector doesn't show the service account option you need.

This guide walks you through exactly how to authenticate Google Calendar in n8n using a service account, step by step, with no gaps.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— n8n users building automation workflows that need Google Calendar access without OAuth2 prompts or user logins
— Developers managing calendars programmatically across multiple accounts or on behalf of an organization
— Anyone who hit the service account wall in n8n and started Googling with nothing useful coming back

WHAT'S INSIDE

— A focused step-by-step setup walkthrough that gets you authenticated and moving, not reading documentation in circles
— A quick-reference summary you can return to the next time you need to repeat this setup
— Clean Markdown formatting that's easy to follow and copy from

One guide, one problem, fully solved.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
